title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 332.131 - Applicant for registration as a dentist, qualifications of
text:
332.131.  Applicant for registration as a dentist, qualifications of. — Any person who is of good moral character and reputation, and who is a graduate of and has a degree in dentistry from an accredited dental school may apply to the board for examination and registration as a dentist in Missouri.
(L. 1969 S.B. 97, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 2018 H.B. 1719)
